name: Stickman Backflip Killer
description: Destroy stickmans using your parkour skill, weapons and epic slowmotion effects Upgrade your outfit and parkour skills, buy weapons, to become the best stickman in the world. Pass cool parkour levels and try out Killer Mode to destroy your enemies. With new stages system new levels will be more exciting and intersting.
instructions: Searching carefully you could find a weapon to defend yourself
